title: eToro Invests in Onchain Derivatives Platform Extended as Brokers Expand DeFi Offerings
summary: eToro is investing in Extended, an onchain derivatives platform, to bring perpetual futures to its Zengo wallet and expand DeFi products. This move comes as traditional brokers like Robinhood also push into decentralized finance.
body:
eToro, a popular trading platform, has announced an investment in Extended, an onchain derivatives platform. The move aims to integrate perpetual futures into eToro's Zengo wallet and expand its decentralized finance (DeFi) offerings on its core platform. This strategic investment is part of a broader trend where traditional brokers are increasingly entering the DeFi space.

The investment in Extended will enable eToro to offer perpetual futures, a type of financial contract that doesn't have an expiration date, to its users. This addition is expected to attract more traders looking for advanced trading options in the DeFi ecosystem. The platform also plans to expand its DeFi products, making them more accessible to its core user base.

This development is significant for everyday users as it lowers the barrier to entry for trading complex financial instruments on the blockchain. By integrating these features into mainstream platforms like eToro, more people can access and benefit from DeFi products without needing deep technical knowledge. It also signals a growing acceptance of DeFi by traditional financial institutions, potentially leading to more innovation and adoption in the space.

As traditional brokers like Robinhood also expand their onchain offerings, the competition in the DeFi space is heating up. Users can expect more platforms to offer advanced trading options and DeFi products, making it easier to participate in decentralized finance. For those interested in trading perpetual futures or exploring DeFi, keeping an eye on eToro's upcoming features and other broker innovations will be crucial.
twitterThread: eToro is diving deeper into DeFi by investing in Extended, a platform for onchain derivatives. Perpetual futures are coming to its Zengo wallet soon.
This move lets eToro offer complex trading tools to everyday users, making DeFi more accessible. Traditional brokers are racing to join the blockchain revolution.

If you're into trading or curious about DeFi, watch for eToro's new features. The future of finance is getting more decentralized. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-03-etoro-invests-in-onchain-derivatives-platform-extended-as-brokers-expand-defi-of
